scenarios.title: the resolver + gate run against all four registry shapes
a fast-path change folds one requirement into the colocated spec
a normal change folds one requirement into the central spec
an untouched capability needs a skip note; without one the fold shouts
an unadopted area resolves nothing until it is registered
a direct edit shows as drift, then reads in-sync after the spec updates
with living specs disabled every verb no-ops
re-folding and re-adopting change nothing the second time
